creator: maxy0440yxam@yahoo.it
text:
Start installer with the mini-memstick image.
Create on the destination hd (GPT) the following partitions:
/ 12gb
/home 2gb
/var 3gb
/var/log 1gb
/tmp 5 gb
/usr/ports 15gb
/root 5 gb

the installer fails with the message "can't create .cshrc on /root".
If you don't use a partition for /root, the installer works correctly.
